package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for upstream_json_decode_same_response_multiple_times: One upstream HTTP response body decoded into multiple targets in the same handler.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule340NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule340NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule340NegativeRecord) (Rule340NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario340Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule340NegativeService, input Rule340NegativeRecord) (Rule340NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule340NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
